title: Rich Buttery Polish Pork Skewers
description: A festive Polish dish featuring buttery pork skewers with a crispy sesame seed crust, perfect for a keto-friendly snack or appetizer. The combination of butter and sesame seeds creates a rich and savory flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted butter, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
Thread 3-4 pork cubes onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each cube.
Roll each skewer in the sesame seeds to coat, pressing the seeds onto the pork to adhere.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers for 15-20 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through and the sesame seeds are golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
